CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(Current_Client__c), Encounter_Level_Data__c, NOT(Med_Mal_Limits_Unique__c), Gross_Margin__c <= 2500000, Gross_Margin_Percent__c >= 0.10, At_Risk_of_Margin__c <= 0.05, NOT(New_State__c), TEXT(Financial_Contract_Type__c) = "Guaranteed Management Fee ($)", Compensation_Buffer__c >= 0.05, NOT(Physician_Comp_Above_Below_State_Avg__c) ), "Offline Approval", "DAM Approval" )
CustomField.label: Approval Tier
